title: Artago 68T/B Maximum Security Padlock, 14mm/0,55in Shackle, Sold Secure Gold Approved, Forged MONOBLOK System, Bunker Selection, Multipurpose Keyed Padlock Combinable with Chains, Door, Container
features: MAXIMUM SECURITY: Padlock included in the BUNKER SELECTION as one of the most exclusive high-end locks. With a ø15mm / 0.59 in shackle made of special hardened steel with side armor. Forged steel body with double treatment, inside and outside.

SOLD SECURE GOLD APPROVED: It has passed the most demanding tests of the main English approval agency. Thoroughly tested against shears, freeze spray, drills, saws, picks, crowbars, etc. with success.

DISC-TECH ART+: ARTAGO 68T/B incorporates a high security DISC-TECH ART+ lock that locks a 15mm/0.59 in diameter shackle with double locking mechanism, inside a forged steel body with MONOBLOK system. All this makes the 68T/B the #1 strongest padlock in comparative tests.

MONOBLOK: One of the keys to its unbeatable strength results is due to its exclusive MONOBLOK concept, this system consists of processing a single piece of forged steel to achieve a body that is as compact and safe as it is unique.
MADE IN EUROPE: Maximum security padlock manufactured by Artago Secure, specialist in high-end security products. Their factory is among the most advanced and qualified worldwide, located in Europe.
description: Product Description ARTAGO 68T/B The Artago 68 padlock with key combines uniqueness and elegance in an exceptional security solution . Its ø14mm arc, equipped with a double locking system, provides unbreakable resistance to tampering or force attempts. In addition, its multi-purpose functionality makes it capable of adapting to a wide range of security needs. With a distinctive design and premium materials , the Artago 68 heavy duty padlock is the perfect choice for those seeking an unparalleled combination of style and protection. APPROVED SAFETY Experience ultimate peace of mind with the Artago 68 high security padlock, backed by the prestigious SOLD SECURE GOLD certification . This device has proven its exceptional resistance by passing all tests simulating real burglary attacks. MONOBLOK SYSTEM This high security lock and key stands out for its unparalleled strength results, thanks to the innovative MONOBLOK concept . This revolutionary system involves the processing of a single piece of forged steel of maximum resistance , achieving a compact and secure body, raising the standards of protection. Ø14mm FORK This heavy duty padlock with key features a ø14mm locking bow made of special hardened steel, backed by lateral armor that provides protection against saws, shears, mallets and crowbars, this combination of materials and technologies provides comprehensive security, ensuring the best resistance against attacks. SIDE SHIELDING This advanced system provides this steel padlock with an additional layer of protection strategically designed to resist tampering attempts and lateral attacks. By integrating this armor, the strength of the padlock is reinforced ensuring an all-around defense. DOUBLE LOCKING SYSTEM This maximum security padlock features a powerful defense by locking its fork at both ends. This ingenious design doubles the resistance against possible attacks . Known as a double locking system that gives you a piece of mind an unparalleled confidence in the protection of your belongings. ART+ TECHNOLOGY The DISC-TECH ART+ disc lock on the Artago 68T/B padlock with key features advanced unpickable protection, backed by a 5 mm anti-drillling disc. KEY DUPLICATION SERVICE DISC-TECH ART+ locks not only stand out for their high security, but also because they provide convenience by allowing the request of duplicate keys at any time through their code system. DOUBLE ANTI-RUST TREATMENT The Artago 68Y/B keyed padlock also features a double rustproofing treatment, both inside and out, offering exceptional resistance against the elements . This ensures reliable long-term performance even in adverse weather conditions. MULTIFUNCTION This versatile, high security padlock offers a variety of uses, making it ideal for securing gates lock, fences lock, storage lock, outdoor pad lock and more. You can combine it with Artago 14 chains and heavy duty Artago 61 or 60 anchors for extended security for your motorcycle, bike or scooter in parking lots. DIMENSIONS BUNKER SELECTION The “BUNKER SELECTION” range of the Artago brand offers an exclusive selection of high-end padlocks and anti-theft devices , where every detail has been taken care of. It stands out for its quality in terms of integration, functionality and resistance. Rely on this line to experience a superior standard of security, backed by the design and manufacturing excellence of the renowned Artago brand.
